Y/N" INPUT Group IF Group = "Y" THEN OUTPUT "How many people in the group?" INPUT LionFeedingNumber IF TotalPeople >= LionFeedingNumber THEN TotalCost ’é¼ TotalCost + LionFeedingNumber * LionfeedingPrice ENDIF OUTUT "How many people would like to see the penguin feeding?"
